title: DUCTILE: Agentic LLM Orchestration of Engineering Analysis in Product Development Practice
description: Source code for the DUCTILE framework. DUCTILE (Delegated, User-supervised Coordination of Tool- and document-Integrated LLM-Enabled) is an approach for developing, executing and evaluating LLM-based agentic automation of engineering analysis tasks. Accompanying the paper published in the ASME Journal of Mechanical Design.
